agent-native-catalog.note: Hard requirement. Applied to all 35 entries. Zero false positives.

yaml-only-direct-push.note: Best practice for data-only commits. No regressions across 3 pushes.

auto-pipeline-for-curation.note: Cross-domain pattern. 5 successful pipeline runs including 6-track parallel enhancement.

execFileSync-over-execSync.note: Security: never use execSync(string). 3 files migrated. No regressions.

test-for-every-skill.note: Every skill MUST have a test file. 12+2=14 untested skills identified and fixed. 47 skills covered.

batch-catalog-additions.note: New rule from incremental-catalog-runs anti-pattern. Not yet exercised.

append-not-insert-yaml.note: New rule from mid-file-yaml-edits anti-pattern. Not yet exercised.

jaccard-originality-check.note: Shingle-based Jaccard similarity check. 47 skills checked, worst 19.3%, zero false positives.

verify-gate-before-advance.note: Prevents skipping quality gates. Verified across Phase 1 (10 transitions) and 6-track build.

skill-structural-linter.note: Structural lint check. 47 skills, 41 clean, 6 warnings, 0 errors.

six-track-parallel-execution.note: 6 independent tracks dispatched in parallel with zero file conflicts. 50 files, 5858 insertions.

owasp-security-scan-asi-patterns.note: 40 detection patterns across OWASP ASI01-ASI08. 47 skills scanned, 0 CRITICAL findings.

mcp-discovery-well-known.note: RFC Cloudflare .well-known/agent-skills/index.json format. 47 skill modules indexed with SHA-256 digests.

test-convention-node-test.note: Declare test_convention: node:test before subagent dispatch. Prevented mixed imports during 6-track integration. All new tests use node:test imports.

catalog-yaml-valid.note: YAML validated every time. Zero syntax errors across 35 entries.

catalog-category-count.note: Category counts verified. All hitting targets. 6 gap finds.

test-suite.note: 765 tests passing (633 Jest + 132 node:test). 57 Jest suites + 21 node:test suites.

handoff-templates.note: Verifies all 8 handoff docs exist. Never failed.

phase-gates-doc.note: Verifies gates.md has all phase transitions documented. Never failed.

index-json-integrity.note: Validates .well-known/agent-skills/index.json matches on-disk skills. 47 entries verified.

quality-scores.note: Validates catalog/quality-scores.json covers all 35 tools. All scored, no D-grade tools.

security-scan.note: OWASP ASI01-ASI08 scan of all 47 skills. 0 CRITICAL findings.

spec-gates-g09-g14.note: 6 new spec enforcement gates (G09-G14). All pass on current skills.

node-test-suite.note: node:test runner for 6 excluded files. 132 tests, 21 suites, all pass.

proposed_rules.name: use-handoff-at-transitions
proposed_rules.reason: Every phase transition must produce a handoff.md using docs/handoffs/ templates. Prevents context loss between layers.

proposed_rules.name: regex-in-jest-config
proposed_rules.reason: Escape dots in Jest testPathIgnorePatterns — they use regex, not glob. Bug hid 2 test files (10 tests).
proposed_rules.note: Applied during deep audit. All dot-separated patterns now use \\. regex escaping.

tdd.reason: No production code in curation projects. Rule had zero applicability.

mid-file-yaml-edits.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: append-not-insert-yaml.

incremental-catalog-runs.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: batch-catalog-additions.

verify-before-describe.reason: Reclassified as anti-pattern. Replaced by: pre-verify-tool-metadata.

pre-verify-tool-metadata.reason: Never implemented. 0 fires. Replaced by test-for-every-skill + regex-in-jest-config.
